---
title: "Media"
pagetitle: "Lukas Fink | Media"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

<style>
#title-block-header {
  margin-top: 2rem;
}

#interviews {
  margin-top: 3rem;
}
</style>

## Interviews {#interviews}

**[Wer top publizieren will, kommt an Open Science nicht vorbei](https://open-science-future.zbw.eu/wer-top-publizieren-will-kommt-an-open-science-nicht-vorbei/){target="_blank" .title-link}**  
*ZBW- Open Science Magazin,* September, 2025.  
**[English version](https://open-science-future.zbw.eu/en/publish-at-highest-level-no-getting-around-open-science/){target="_blank" .title-link}**
